Various Uses of Besto Cotton Rope For Everyday Laundry It is strong enough to handle all kinds of your everyday laundry, making it perfect for indoors or outdoors. Can Be Used for Arts & Crafts Create fun and unique homemade crafts, adding a charming touch to your home decor or gifts. Previous page No Creases or Stains Its soft and strong material won’t let your clothes crease or stained. Avoid Rope Slouching The thick synthetic core inside prevents the rope from slouching Multiple Strands Made with multiple strands, this cotton rope is strong & reliable for all your laundry needs. Next page 1 No Creases or Stains 2 Avoid Rope Slouching 3 Multiple Strands Suitable for Wet & Heavy Laundry Besto washing line cotton rope is designed to maintain its shape while handling all your wet laundry weights. What is Besto washing line rope made of? Our washing line rope is made of quality polypropylene and cotton. How many sizes of our cotton rope are available? It is available in 10M, 15M, 20M, 25M, & 30M lengths with a thickness of 4mm. Can our cotton rope be used in arts and crafts? Although it is recommended as a washing line, it can also be used to make various arts and crafts. Can this washing line rope handle heavy-weight laundry? Besto washing line cotton rope is designed to maintain its shape while handling all your laundry weights. Is this washing line rope suitable for outdoor use? Yes, our washing line rope is designed for both indoor and outdoor use, providing reliable performance in various weather conditions.
